comment: The platform is excellent for automation and the team has been very responsive to our needs.
Licensing costs are far too high and the pricing model is not transparent. We are reconsidering our investment.
Good product overall; however, the support response times could be much better. Documentation is lacking.
Amazing platform. Robust, scalable, and the customization options are outstanding. Would highly recommend.
The product has potential but implementation was difficult and expensive. Our account manager was helpful though.
Terrible experience. The system is unreliable and support tickets take weeks to resolve. Very frustrated.
